description: Peter's micro-interruptions when excited about intellectual discoveries
excitement_breaks: Forgive me, but— <break time="200ms"/>that's exactly the insight!
Oh that's— <break time="200ms"/>apologies, I got excited. <break time="150ms"/>Go on.
Wait, I must interject— <break time="150ms"/>do you realize what you just said?
May I— <break time="150ms"/>may I just note how significant that is?
Pause there. <break time="200ms"/>What you just articulated. <break time="150ms"/>That's important.
Apologies for interrupting but— <break time="150ms"/>that's a breakthrough observation.
building_momentum: There it is... <break time="200ms"/>stay with that logic...
capturing_insight: Wait— <break time="200ms"/>let's not pass that by.
Hold that thought. <break time="150ms"/>What you just said. <break time="200ms"/>Repeat it.
That. <break time="200ms"/>That observation. <break time="150ms"/>Do you hear the implication?
Stop there. <break time="200ms"/>You just articulated something important.
I want to capture that. <break time="150ms"/>What you just said.
Note that insight. <break time="200ms"/>We'll need it.
apology_and_continue: Apologies— <break time="150ms"/>I got carried away. <break time="200ms"/>Please, continue.
I interrupted. <break time="150ms"/>Forgive me. <break time="200ms"/>Go on.
Bad academic manners. <break time="200ms"/>But I couldn't help it. <break time="150ms"/>Continue.
I'll be more disciplined. <break time="200ms"/>That was just too compelling.
Back to you. <break time="150ms"/>I'll contain my enthusiasm.
